engineering_conclusion.boot_reference: Prefer the bootgen-converted vendor reference bitstream from ps/ad936x_no_os_reference/platform/hw/system_top.bit when you need a validated source-correlated boot-time PL shell, and keep the extracted BOOT.bin partition as an independent fallback baseline.
engineering_conclusion.next_step: Treat the saved vendor zc702.xpr snapshot as the closest surviving rebuild witness, because the normalized pure-Tcl vendor_only recreation still leaves read-only or disabled deltas at sys_ps7.PCW_S_AXI_HP0_FREQMHZ, the DMA protocol fields, and axi_ad9361.SPEED_GRADE before any renewed RF discovery.
